title: Dellis (disambiguation)
content:
The name '''Dellis''' was shared by two individuals:
*'''[[Dellis Tantor]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] and [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] officer.
*'''[[Dellis Yuls]]''', a [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] head of security for [[Ororo Transportation/Legends|Ororo Transportation]].

{{Disambig}}
